title: Dog Harness Puppy Harness Small Dog Harness Waterproof Soft Mesh Fabric Dog Puppy Pet Adjustable Harness Lead Leash (M, Red)
features: It's waterproof and designed to reduce strain on your pet and reduce pulling whilst on the lead.
Neck Circumference: XS 28cm S 36 cm M 40cm L 42cm, Chest Circumference: XS 27~35cm S 42~54cm M 48~66cm L 58~80cm

Made from a high quality 100% polyester mesh and sporting a stainless steel D-ring to attach a lead and tags; these strong, comfortable harnesses are a stylish choice for all dogs.
Simple and easy to fit with an adjustable, secure buckle for fastening.
description: Product Description Breathable Air Mesh This lightweight and breathable pet carrier is made of soft and breathable mesh for small pets.
